title: 'Soglio' cosmetics
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 1. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 15 CH1. Soglio is a well established brand of cosmetics from Grisons, which refines natural alpine raw materials into body care products of the highest quality. These are sold in big retailers and small local shops alike.
